truths.statement: Google Docs / Drive contains important UMH and projection SaaS documentation
GitHub contains committed source state, branches, PRs, and historical code
Device filesystems contain local app source files and working versions
Windows Beast /dev is candidate Trinity app source location
Trinity apps include EOS, CreatorOS, and LyfeOS
/opt/OS contains UMH operating substrate and production truth
/opt/OS/saas must converge with Windows Beast EOS source
No single source is assumed canonical until reconciliation
Feature build is blocked until source inspection/canonicality decisions are complete
